case_title: CCSF-TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. NAUN PEREZ

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-15-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-15-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY ROSEBEL SINGH--SR. UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF-TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEREZ, NAUN $2,183.99 PRINCIPAL, $1,077.04 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,261.03
